Message.title: Chat Message
Message.description: A single message in a conversation, either from a user or the assistant.

userId.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this chat.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

content.description: The text content of the message.

sql.description: Optional SQL query generated by the AI.

results.description: Optional mock or real data results for the SQL query.

error.description: Optional error message if processing failed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the message was created.

/chats/{chatId}.description: Collection of chat messages for the operational assistant.
